Sales engagement platform for contacts,: Sales engagement platform for contacts, campaigns, and outbound outreach workflows.
Your Reply.io API key. Find it in Reply.io under **Settings → API**.
Look up a contact in Reply.io by their e: Look up a contact in Reply.io by their email address and retrieve their details.
Add a new contact to Reply.io, or update: Add a new contact to Reply.io, or update their details if a contact with that email already exists.
Permanently delete a contact from Reply.io by their email address. This cannot be undone.
Create a new contact (or update an exist: Create a new contact (or update an existing one) and immediately enrol them in a campaign so they start receiving outreach emails.
Enrol an existing contact in a campaign: Enrol an existing contact in a campaign so they start receiving outreach emails. Enable "Force Push" to move the contact even if they are already active in another campaign.
Stop a contact from receiving further em: Stop a contact from receiving further emails in a specific campaign. The contact's record is kept in Reply.io.
Remove a contact from every campaign the: Remove a contact from every campaign they are enrolled in. No further emails will be sent to them. Their contact record is kept in Reply.io.
Record that a contact has replied to you: Record that a contact has replied to your outreach. This stops further follow-up emails to that contact across all active campaigns.
Mark a contact as finished so they no lo: Mark a contact as finished so they no longer receive emails in any campaign. Use this when you have completed all outreach to that contact.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Email address of the contact to look up.
The contact's email address. Used to ide: The contact's email address. Used to identify and deduplicate contacts.
The company or organisation the contact: The company or organisation the contact works for.
Contact's job title, e.g. \"VP of Sales\: Contact's job title, e.g. "VP of Sales" or "Marketing Manager".
Full URL to the contact's LinkedIn profi: Full URL to the contact's LinkedIn profile, e.g. https://linkedin.com/in/janedoe
City the contact is based in.

Country the contact is based in.
IANA time zone name used to schedule ema: IANA time zone name used to schedule emails at the right local time, e.g. "America/New_York" or "Europe/London".
Email address of the contact to permanen: Email address of the contact to permanently delete.
Internal notes about this contact. Not v: Internal notes about this contact. Not visible to the contact.
Email address of the contact to add to t: Email address of the contact to add to the campaign.
Move the contact into this campaign even: Move the contact into this campaign even if they are already active in another campaign. Leave off to skip contacts already in an active campaign.
Email address of the contact to remove f: Email address of the contact to remove from the campaign.
Email address of the contact to remove from all campaigns.
Email address of the contact to mark as: Email address of the contact to mark as replied.
Email address of the contact to mark as finished.
